name: rtl-markdown-editor
description: A full-featured WYSIWYG editor for RTL Markdown with Persian font support.

commands.title: Open with Ag4s RTL Markdown Editor

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.imageSave.description: Save images to which folder when upload in markdown, default relative to the markdown file, you can set to project root via `${projectRoot}/assets`.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.useVscode.description: Use vscode theme's background color as the markdown editor's background color.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.customCss.description: Custom CSS rules injected into the markdown editor webview.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.enableRtl.description: Enable automatic right-to-left layout for lines containing Persian or Arabic text. English lines stay left-to-right. Code blocks are always left-to-right.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.persianFo.description: Font family for Persian/Arabic text. Default is the bundled Vazirmatn font. Set any installed system font name to use a local font instead.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.englishFo.description: Font family for English/Latin text. Leave empty to use the VS Code editor font.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.persianFo.description: Scale Persian/Arabic text size relative to the default editor size. 100 keeps the current size; lower values shrink and higher values enlarge.

algo4stock.rtl-markdown-editor.englishFo.description: Scale English/Latin text size relative to the default editor size. 100 keeps the current size; lower values shrink and higher values enlarge.

scripts.pub: foy build && npm version patch && git push origin master --tags && vsce package && vsce publish && npx ovsx create-namespace <name> -p 5f4914bf-d59b-4fb9-ac0a-b0dac1748eee
